subcodes.first_line: O loving friend! Two letters from thee have been received... [3.5s]... ...His honor, Sheikh Faraju'llah, has here rendered into Arabic with greatest care the Ishraqat… A translation is like unto a husk, whereas the original is even as a pith
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان دو نامه از شما رسید ... ترجمه مانند قشر است و اصل مانند مغز
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
